#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
#include <limits>
#include <cmath>

bool solve(std::vector<long long> nums1) {
    if (nums1.empty()) {
        // Based on constraints N >= 1, but defensive check.
        return true; 
    }

    std::vector<long long> evens;
    std::vector<long long> odds;

    for (long long x : nums1) {
        if (x % 2 == 0) {
            evens.push_back(x);
        } else {
            odds.push_back(x);
        }
    }

    // 1. Check T=0 (All Even)
    // Possible iff all elements are even (Odds set is empty).
    if (odds.empty()) {
        return true;
    }

    // If we reach here, odds is not empty. T=0 is impossible.
    
    // 2. Check T=1 (All Odd)
    // Requires finding min_odd, and ensuring every even number > min_odd.
    
    // Find minimum odd number
    long long min_odd = std::numeric_limits<long long>::max();
    for (long long o : odds) {
        if (o < min_odd) {
            min_odd = o;
        }
    }
    
    // Check condition for all even numbers
    for (long long e : evens) {
        // Must be possible to convert e to odd, which requires e > min_odd
        if (e <= min_odd) {
            return false; // T=1 fails
        }
    }

    // If all checks pass (or if evens list was empty), T=1 is possible.
    return true;
}
